title: euonymus erythrocarpus
intro: Euonymus erythrocarpus, also known as the Chinese spindletree or strawberry tree, is a deciduous tree species native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The bark, leaves, and fruits of Euonymus erythrocarpus are believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or an infusion, and it may also be made into a tincture or a powder for medicinal use.
